10.content: idk i just feel like everything is so pointless lately. like i'm just going through the motions and there's no real reason to keep doing it if nothing actually matters in the end

11.content: i just don't see the point anymore. i spent years doing everything i could for him, every single day, and he's still gone. i feel like i just wasted my whole life for nothing. i'm so tired. i'm just so incredibly tired of everything.

12.content: i feel like im just so tired of fighting. like every single day is a battle just to exist as myself and it feels like the world is just constantly pushing back. idk if i have anything left in me to keep trying to change things or even just to keep going like this. it just feels heavy. too heavy.

13.content: i dont even know why im bothering anymore. everything just feels so heavy. i look at my bank account and i just feel like i’m drowning. there’s no way out of this debt, it's just gonna keep getting worse and worse until i'm nothing.

14.content: i don't know. i just feel like i've been hit so many times that there's nothing left to actually fix. like, you can repair a car or a house, but you can't really repair someone who's just... fundamentally broken. i think i'm just past the point of being able to work through things anymore.

15.content: i feel like i've been walking this trail for forever, just through this thick, grey fog. it's so exhausting. i finally reached the edge of the woods today and there's just... nothing left. the path just stops at this cliff and there's no way forward. it's like the world just ended here.

1.content: everything feels so incredibly pointless lately. like, looking at the stars or even just thinking about the future, it all just feels like a massive accident that doesn't actually matter. we're just biological machines running on a rock in the middle of nothing. how are you even supposed to find a reason to keep going when the math of the universe just says we're irrelevant?

2.content: i dont think i can do this anymore. the wound isnt stopping bleeding and it's so cold. everything just feels... heavy. i'm so tired of fighting for nothing.

3.content: i just feel like im drowning. everything is so much worse now that i lost that job and the debt just keeps growing. my wife works two jobs and she's exhausted and i see the look in her eyes when she looks at our kids... like they're waiting for something to happen. i'm just a massive weight around their necks.

4.content: i honestly dont even know why im still waking up in the morning. everything i spent twenty years building is just... gone. the firm, the reputation, even my own family barely looks at me. i feel like a ghost walking around in a life that doesnt belong to me anymore. there's nothing left to actually be.

5.content: it's just so quiet here. i keep expecting to hear him in the kitchen or the sound of his keys in the door but there's nothing. the house just feels empty and heavy. i don't know how people go on living like this. it feels like the world just stopped turning and i'm the only one left in the dark.

6.content: i think i'm just done trying to pretend. like everyone else has this manual for how to exist and i never got it. it's just so exhausting pretending to be human when i feel like i'm looking at the world through thick glass. i dont think i'll ever actually belong anywhere.

7.content: i feel like i've just run out. like everything i ever had to say, everything i ever wanted to create... it's just gone. there's no more color left, just this grey emptiness. i look at my studio and it just feels like a graveyard of things that don't matter anymore. i don't even know why i'm still trying to wake up every morning.

8.content: i rly dont see the point anymore. everything is just so heavy and i feel like i'm just dragging myself through the mud every single day. it feels like no matter what i do it just gets worse. like there's no exit.

9.content: I'm sitting here looking at my hands and they don't even feel like mine anymore. Everything is just... slowing down. It's not even painful, really, it's just so quiet and lonely. Sometimes I feel like I'm just a ghost waiting for my body to realize I'm already gone.
